title: Sexual Assault and Killing of Girl Set Off Days of Protest in West Bengal
summary_full: After promising to improve safety for women in the Indian state, the party of Prime Minister Narendra Modi is facing public anger after the death of an 11-year-old girl.
summary_public: After promising to improve safety for women in the Indian state, the party of Prime Minister Narendra Modi is facing public anger after the death of an 11-year-old girl.
